content:
Ahmed: Good morning everyone. Quick updates — I'll submit the PR for the search feature today, it's fully reviewed internally.
Sara: I'll finish the DB migration by Thursday. The schema changes are all mapped out.
Ali: I should be able to review Sara's PR today, schedules permitting.
Zara: I'll try to look at the mobile bug that came in last night. It's intermittent so might take time.
Omar: I'll handle the customer escalation from Acme Corp — they need a response by EOD.
Riya: Can Sara review my authentication module PR? Also, Ahmed, please check the monitoring alerts after your deploy.
Omar: On the release — we're pushing the release to next Monday. Everyone agree?
All: Agreed.
Ahmed: We should probably look at improving the test coverage overall once this sprint is done.
Sara: Someone needs to follow up with the client about their integration questions too.
